summary.en: Console gaming as a 2-sided platform: gamers (subsidy side, low-margin or loss-leader hardware) + game developers (money side, paying licensing fees per copy sold). Released November 2006, the Wii sold 101 million units lifetime — a top-3 best-selling console of all time — by deliberately serving the casual / family audience that PlayStation and Xbox were ignoring. BMG's second paradigm case for the Multi-Sided Platforms pattern, paired with Google. The contrast with Sony's PS3 (released the same month, sold at a loss with cutting-edge hardware) shows the platform-economics choice clearly: Nintendo bet on motion controls + a broader gamer side at lower hardware cost, then funded the platform via developer royalties.
summary.zh: 把游戏主机看作双边平台:玩家(补贴方,主机低毛利甚至亏损出货)+ 游戏开发者(收钱方,按销量付授权费)。2006 年 11 月发售,Wii 累计销量 1.01 亿台 —— 史上销量前三的主机之一 —— 靠的是有意服务 PlayStation 和 Xbox 一直忽视的「轻度玩家 / 家庭用户」。这是《商业模式新生代》中多边平台模式的第二个范式案例,与 Google 并列。Wii 与索尼同月发售的 PS3(顶级硬件、亏本出货)形成清晰对照,把平台经济学的取舍呈现得很清楚:任天堂赌「体感操作 + 在更低硬件成本下覆盖更广的玩家」,然后靠开发者版税养活整个平台。

sources.label: Osterwalder & Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Wiley · 2010 (pp. 76-81, 178-179)
Eisenmann, Parker & Van Alstyne · 'Strategies for Two-Sided Markets' · Harvard Business Review · October 2006
Mochizuki & Tabuchi · 'Why Nintendo's Wii Beat Sony's PS3' · Wall Street Journal · 2008
Iwata Asks · interviews on the Wii development
Blue Ocean Strategy · 7 Powerful Blue Ocean Strategy Examples

headline.en: A bridge case between platform economics and blue ocean positioning
headline.zh: 连接平台经济学和蓝海定位的桥梁案例

whyOpen.en: Nintendo Wii is valuable because it combines a two-sided console platform with a Blue Ocean move toward families and casual players.
whyOpen.zh: 任天堂 Wii 值得学，是因为它同时具备双边主机平台逻辑和面向家庭 / 轻度玩家的蓝海动作。

audience.en: Readers comparing platform subsidies, developer incentives, and differentiated value curves.
audience.zh: 适合比较平台补贴、开发者激励和差异化价值曲线的读者。

commonMisreads.en: Wii was not only a gimmick controller; the lower-cost hardware, broader audience, and developer economics fit together.
commonMisreads.zh: Wii 不只是一个新奇手柄；低成本硬件、更广受众和开发者经济共同构成了模型。

practicePrompts.en: Which underserved audience would change your product requirements instead of only your marketing message?
practicePrompts.zh: 哪类未被服务的人群会改变你的产品要求，而不只是改变营销话术？
